description_long: This object represents a human jogger in mid-stride, with a dynamic pose suggesting forward motion. The figure is dressed in a fitted, short-sleeve top and shorts, both appearing to be made from lightweight, breathable fabric suitable for running. The arms are bent at the elbows, with one arm swinging forward and the other back, while the legs are in a running gait, one foot off the ground. The jogger is wearing running shoes with a distinct, thick sole, optimized for impact absorption. The head is upright, and there are no visible accessories such as hats, headphones, or armbands. The overall form is athletic and streamlined, emphasizing movement and activity.
description: A dynamic, athletic jogger in fitted running attire and running shoes, captured mid-stride with arms and legs in motion.
description_view_0: Front view showing the jogger's face, chest, and forward arm swing, with one leg extended forward.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the jogger, bent arms, and the stride with one leg behind.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back, shoulders, and the trailing leg, with the head facing forward.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the opposite profile, arm swing, and the forward leg in stride.
attribute_clothing_type: Fitted short-sleeve athletic shirt and knee-length running shorts, both made from lightweight, breathable synthetic fabric.
attribute_footwear_type: Running shoes with a thick, cushioned sole, primarily black with some lighter accents.
attribute_running_posture: Upright running posture with head facing forward, arms bent at the elbows and swinging in opposition to the legs, one leg extended forward and the other back, indicating a mid-stride dynamic.
